title: Habits screen: active list + loading/error + pull-to-refresh

task.description: Create Habits tab screen that lists active (non-archived) habits from SQLite ordered by sortOrder/createdAt. Provide loading indicator, visible error state with Retry, empty state CTA to create a habit, and pull-to-refresh to fully reload from SQLite.
acceptance_criteria: Screen root uses `SafeAreaView`; the list is a `FlatList` with `RefreshControl`
On initial load, `ActivityIndicator` renders and no stale rows from prior state are shown
On repository error, a visible error message and a "Retry" button are shown; tapping Retry re-runs the load
Empty state shows text + a Button that navigates to the habit editor modal route
Each row main tap area has `min-h-[48px]`; tapping a row navigates to edit modal with the habit id as a param

definition_of_done: List refresh and navigation compile on both iOS and Android
No ScrollView is used for the dynamic list
ui_requirements: SafeAreaView p-4; header row with title and "New" button; FlatList gap-3; row: icon + name + meta (daily/weekly). States: loading, error+retry, empty+CTA, pull-to-refresh.
